app.name: Professor Somleng TTS
app.tagline: Transform Text to Natural Khmer Speech
app.description: Professional text-to-speech studio with natural Khmer voices

hero.title: Transform Text to Natural Khmer Speech
hero.subtitle: Professional text-to-speech with the most natural Khmer voices. Create voiceovers, narrations, and audio content in seconds.

features.title: Why Choose Professor Somleng?
features.subtitle: Built for Khmer from the ground up

khmerFirst.title: Khmer-First Design
khmerFirst.description: Optimized for Khmer script with proper rendering of subscripts, coeng, and diacritics.

naturalVoices.title: Natural Neural Voices
naturalVoices.description: AI-powered voices that sound natural and expressive, not robotic.

multipleStyles.title: 12 Voice Styles
multipleStyles.description: From news broadcast to poetry, choose the perfect tone for your content.

fineControl.title: Fine-Tuned Control
fineControl.description: Adjust speed, pitch, and volume to get exactly the delivery you need.

fastGeneration.title: Instant Generation
fastGeneration.description: Generate high-quality audio in seconds, not minutes.

downloadFormats.title: MP3 & WAV Export
downloadFormats.description: Download in the format you need for any project or platform.

step1.title: Type or Paste
step1.description: Enter your Khmer or English text in the editor.

step2.title: Choose Your Voice
step2.description: Select a voice, style, and fine-tune the delivery.

step3.title: Generate & Download
step3.description: Click Generate and download your audio file.

footer.copyright: © 2024 Professor Somleng TTS. All rights reserved.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ for the Khmer language

editor.label: Editor
editor.placeholder:
Type or paste your text here...

Try: Hello! Welcome to Professor Somleng TTS, the best text-to-speech tool for Khmer.

emotion.label: Emotion Controls
emotion.neutralDesc: Natural, balanced delivery with no specific emotion
emotion.happyDesc: Warm, bright, and cheerful with a smile in the voice
emotion.fidelityWarning: High expressiveness may reduce voice clone fidelity
emotion.info: Emotion controls shape how the cloned voice delivers text. Adjust expressiveness for pitch/tempo variation, intensity for emotion strength, and fidelity for clone accuracy.

player.title: Generated Audio
player.noAudio: Generate speech to see the audio player

errors.emptyText: Please enter some text to generate speech.
errors.tooLong: Text is too long. Maximum {max} characters allowed.
errors.generationFailed: Failed to generate speech. Please try again.
errors.quotaExceeded: You have exceeded your monthly character limit.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

history.title: Generation History
history.empty: No generations yet. Create some speech in the Studio!
history.clearConfirm: Are you sure? This will delete all history.
